name: Soviet Anomaly 7
short_description: Investigate an abandoned Soviet-era building with anomalous properties. As a researcher, you must navigate the eerie, ever-changing corridors to uncover the truth. One wrong move could send you back to the beginning. Explore. Survive. Don’t miss the anomaly.
detailed_description:
You entered by choice. Can you find your way out?

The Soviet era has long faded into history. But its shadows still linger... In the heart of an abandoned scientific facility lies a mysterious anomaly. This place exists outside of time, reason, and logic. You are a scientist, an investigator accustomed to confronting the unexplained. But what awaits you here will turn your world upside down.

What do the walls hide?

This building is an anomaly in itself. Every room challenges your courage and sanity. Lights flicker. Objects shift. Space bends to its own will. But the most terrifying thing isn’t the building — it’s what it knows about you.

Key Features:

  • Investigate anomalies:

    Document strange occurrences, study them, and find your way forward as reality around you crumbles.

  • Puzzles and agility:

    Overcome obstacles, solve mysteries, and use parkour to evade the traps set by the ever-changing environment.

  • Six unique locations:

    From grim Soviet laboratories to surreal spaces where the laws of physics and logic cease to exist.

  • Psychological horror:

    Feel the weight of anxiety, the dread of isolation, and the unsettling question: "Are these walls even real?"

  • Doomer vibes:

    Immerse yourself in a unique atmosphere of decay, echoes of the Soviet era, and unexplainable terror.

The ultimate mystery

Your mission is simple: document the anomalies. But every discovery pulls you closer to the truth. What is this place? Why does it "live"? And most importantly… why does it feel eerily familiar?

Prepare for a game that will challenge your sanity.

40–50 minutes of survival and uncovering the truth.

The anomalies are waiting. Are you ready?

supported_languages:
English*, Russian, Ukrainian, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Spanish - Latin America, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Simplified Chinese
*languages with full audio support
